keyPoints: A Vickrey auction is a sealed-bid auction where the highest bidder wins but pays the second-highest bid.
The dominant strategy in a Vickrey auction is for each bidder to bid their true private valuation.
This type of auction encourages truthful bidding and leads to an efficient allocation of the item.
commonMistakes: Assuming the winner pays their own bid in a second-price auction.
Thinking that bidding above one's true valuation can be beneficial in a Vickrey auction.
Confusing the Vickrey (second-price) auction with an English (ascending bid) auction.
